gift_card_templates.name: Digital Gift Card (Email Delivery)
gift_card_templates.description: Send a digital gift card by email that can be used toward any regular class, pass, workshop, or merchandise.
gift_card_templates.terms: Valid for 24 months from date of purchase. May be redeemed online or at any studio location. Not redeemable for cash except where required by law.

gift_card_templates.name: Digital Intro Gift Card
gift_card_templates.description: A smaller digital gift card ideal for covering intro offers or a couple of drop-in classes.
gift_card_templates.terms: Valid for 12 months from date of purchase. Can be used toward intro offers, drop-in classes, and multi-class passes. No cash value.

gift_card_templates.name: Physical Gift Card (In-Studio Pickup)
gift_card_templates.description: A printed gift card packaged in a sleeve, available for pickup at the Downtown front desk.
gift_card_templates.terms: Card must be presented at time of redemption. Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced. Valid for 24 months from purchase.

passes.name: Adult Single Drop-In Class
passes.restrictions: Valid for any regular adult group class. Not valid for workshops or special events.
passes.description: Perfect for trying out a new style or dropping into class when your schedule allows.

passes.name: 8-Class Adult Value Pack
passes.restrictions: Valid for any regular adult group class. Excludes workshops and series courses.
passes.description: A flexible 8-class pack for adult dancers who attend regularly but not quite often enough for a membership.

passes.name: 8-Class Adult Anytime Pack
passes.restrictions: Can be used for any regular adult group class at any location.
passes.description: Our most popular flexible pack for adult dancers, usable for any style and level.

passes.name: 10-Class Adult Anytime Pack
passes.restrictions: Valid for any regular adult group class. Non-transferable.
passes.description: Great value for committed dancers attending once or twice per week.

passes.name: 20-Class Adult Anytime Pack
passes.restrictions: Valid for any regular adult group class. Non-refundable once activated.
passes.description: Best value for adult students dancing multiple times per week.

passes.name: 8-Class Kids & Teens Pack
passes.restrictions: Valid for kids and teens group classes only. Not valid for adult classes or workshops.
passes.description: A flexible 8-class option for young dancers who need schedule flexibility.

passes.name: Adult Intro Pack: 3 Classes for $30
passes.restrictions: New adult students only. One purchase per person.
passes.description: Try any three adult group classes within three weeks and explore different styles.

passes.name: Adult Free First Class
passes.restrictions: New students only. Must be booked in advance online.
passes.description: Enjoy your first adult group class completely free when you pre-register.

passes.name: Adult Monthly Unlimited Membership
passes.restrictions: Unlimited regular adult group classes. Does not include workshops, events, or private lessons.
passes.description: Best for dedicated dancers attending three or more classes per week.

passes.name: Adult Online-Only Membership
passes.restrictions: Unlimited access to live-streamed adult classes. No in-studio access.
passes.description: Join live classes from home with unlimited online access each month.

passes.name: Kids & Teens Monthly (1x per week)
passes.restrictions: Covers one regular weekly kids or teens group class across the term.
passes.description: Ideal for young dancers enrolled in one weekly class.

passes.name: Kids & Teens Single Drop-In
passes.restrictions: Valid for any regular kids or teens group class where space is available.
passes.description: A flexible option to try out a kids or teens class before committing to a term or membership.

passes.name: 5-Class Workshop Pass
passes.restrictions: Valid only for designated workshops and special events labeled as eligible for the Workshop Pass.
passes.description: Prepay for a series of specialty workshops at a discounted rate.

passes.name: Family 12-Class Shared Pack
passes.restrictions: May be shared between immediate family members for regular group classes only.
passes.description: A flexible 12-class pack that families can share across kids and adult group classes.

policy_sections.title: Adult Drop-In Class Cancellation Policy
policy_sections.content_html:
Adult Drop-In Class Cancellation Policy

We understand that plans can change. To receive a full credit for an adult drop-in class, cancellations must be made at least 24 hours before the scheduled start time.

  • Cancellations made 24 or more hours before class will be credited back to your account as a class credit.
  • Cancellations made less than 24 hours before class, or no-shows, will forfeit the class and no refund or credit will be issued.
  • You can cancel online through your account or by calling the front desk during business hours.

policy_sections.title: Group Class Cancellation & Make-Up Policy
policy_sections.content_html:
Group Class Cancellation & Make-Up Policy

For term-based group courses, we require at least 12 hours notice if you need to cancel a reservation in a specific session.

  • With 12+ hours notice, you may reschedule into another class within the same term, subject to availability.
  • Cancellations with less than 12 hours notice are considered late and the class will be counted as used.
  • If the studio cancels a class, you will receive either a make-up option or a credit to your account.

policy_sections.title: Kids & Teens Missed Classes Policy
policy_sections.content_html:
Kids & Teens Missed Classes

Regular attendance is important for progress and recital preparation. If your child needs to miss a class, please notify us as soon as possible.

  • Up to two make-up classes per term may be scheduled in an equivalent level class, subject to space.
  • Make-ups must be taken within the same term and cannot be carried over.
  • No credits or refunds are issued for missed classes.

policy_sections.title: Payments, Refunds & Credits
policy_sections.content_html:
Payments, Refunds & Credits

We accept major credit cards, debit cards, and in-studio payments. All prices are listed in USD and include applicable taxes unless otherwise noted.

  • Multi-class passes and memberships are non-refundable once activated.
  • Unused passes may be transferred to another person for a $10 administrative fee.
  • Workshops and events may have separate refund rules listed on their event pages.
  • Gift card purchases are final sale and cannot be refunded.

policy_sections.title: Health & Safety Guidelines
policy_sections.content_html:
Health & Safety Guidelines

Your safety is our priority. Please help us keep the studio a safe and welcoming place for everyone.

  • Do not attend class if you are feeling unwell, have a fever, or have been advised to self-isolate.
  • Wear appropriate footwear for your chosen dance style and avoid jewelry that may cause injury.
  • Follow all instructor directions and inform them of any injuries before class begins.
  • Children must be picked up promptly at the end of their class.

studios.name: Downtown Studio
studios.description: Our flagship location featuring three sprung-floor studios, a comfortable lobby, and easy subway access.

studios.name: Midtown Studio
studios.description: A bright midtown space specializing in evening adult classes and weekend workshops.

studios.name: Uptown Studio
studios.description: Cozy neighborhood studio focused on kids & teens programs and beginner-friendly adult classes.

studios.name: Online Studio
studios.address: Virtual via Zoom (link provided after booking)
studios.description: Join live-streamed classes from anywhere in the world in our dedicated online studio.

studios.name: Pop-Up & Event Locations
studios.address: Various venues across the city (see event details)
studios.description: Temporary locations used for special events, intensives, and off-site workshops.

instructors.name: Sofia Martinez
instructors.bio: Sofia specializes in Latin partner work with a focus on lead-follow communication and social dance etiquette. She has trained in New York and Havana and loves helping absolute beginners feel confident on the dance floor.
instructors.certifications: Certified Latin Dance Instructor (Dance Teachers United), CPR/First Aid

instructors.name: Li Wei
instructors.bio: Li Wei brings a classical ballet background with a contemporary teaching approach, emphasizing healthy technique, musicality, and joy in movement for both kids and adults.
instructors.certifications: Royal Academy of Dance (RAD) Registered Teacher

instructors.name: Jamal Thompson
instructors.bio: Jamal teaches high-energy hip hop and commercial choreography classes that blend foundations, grooves, and current trends. His classes are welcoming to beginners and challenging for experienced dancers.

instructors.name: Emma Ross
instructors.bio: Emma is a contemporary specialist who focuses on fluid floorwork, expressive choreography, and safe alignment. She loves tailoring private lessons to each dancer’s creative goals.
instructors.certifications: BFA in Dance Performance, Yoga Alliance 200HR

instructors.name: Daniel Kim
instructors.bio: Daniel blends contemporary technique with improvisation and conditioning. His teaching emphasizes injury prevention and helping dancers build sustainable practices.
instructors.certifications: Pilates Mat Certified, Contemporary Teaching Certificate (CDTA)

instructors.name: Chloe Nguyen
instructors.bio: Chloe teaches jazz and musical theatre with an emphasis on storytelling, clean lines, and performance quality, especially for teen dancers preparing for auditions.

instructors.name: Miguel Santos
instructors.bio: Miguel teaches partnerwork-focused salsa and bachata, breaking down timing, frame, and connection so that new dancers feel comfortable in social settings.

instructors.name: Rachel Cohen
instructors.bio: Rachel specializes in foundational ballet training for children and adult beginners, focusing on posture, coordination, and confidence at the barre.

instructors.name: Aiden Patel
instructors.bio: Aiden teaches beginner-friendly hip hop and groove classes, focusing on rhythm, confidence, and having fun while learning core street dance foundations.

instructors.name: Grace Lee
instructors.bio: Grace is a tap specialist who focuses on musicality, rhythm, and clarity of sound, teaching both kids and adults from beginner to advanced levels.
instructors.certifications: Tap Dance Teachers Network Certified Instructor

instructors.name: Nora Alvarez
instructors.bio: Nora teaches ballroom and social dance styles, from waltz and foxtrot to Latin club favorites, with a focus on partnership skills and social confidence.

instructors.name: Oliver Gray
instructors.bio: Oliver teaches contemporary technique and stretch/conditioning classes exclusively through the Online Studio, making high-quality training accessible from anywhere.

instructors.name: Hannah Brooks
instructors.bio: Hannah focuses on creative movement and pre-ballet for young children, using imaginative exercises to build coordination, focus, and a love of dance.

instructors.name: Kai Tanaka
instructors.bio: Kai teaches hip hop and grooves in live-streamed classes, with clear breakdowns that work especially well for dancers training at home.

instructors.name: Lucas Rossi
instructors.bio: Lucas teaches jazz and contemporary fusion for adults, focusing on dynamic choreography, across-the-floor progressions, and musical interpretation.

group_classes.name: Beginner Salsa A (Downtown Mondays)
group_classes.description: An 8-week beginner salsa course covering timing, basic steps, and simple partner patterns. Ideal for absolute beginners with no prior experience.
group_classes.price_notes: Price is for the full 8-week course. Drop-ins allowed if space permits at the standard adult drop-in rate.

group_classes.name: Beginner Salsa B (Midtown Tuesdays)
group_classes.description: A friendly beginner salsa class focusing on lead-follow basics and social dance confidence. No partner required.
group_classes.price_notes: Special spring pricing for the April beginner cycle. Can also be attended with an 8-class or 10-class adult pack.

group_classes.name: Beginner Salsa C (Uptown Thursdays)
group_classes.description: A small-group beginner salsa class focusing on timing, basic turns, and dance floor navigation.
group_classes.price_notes: Course fee for 8 weeks. Eligible for free first-class intro pass for new students.

group_classes.name: Kids Ballet I (Ages 6–8) Uptown
group_classes.description: An introduction to ballet for children ages 6–8, focusing on musicality, basic positions, and creative movement.
group_classes.price_notes: Price is per 10-week term. Make-up classes available per kids policy.

group_classes.name: Kids Ballet I/II (Ages 7–10) Downtown
group_classes.description: A levelled kids ballet class for ages 7–10 introducing proper alignment, simple barre work, and center combinations.
group_classes.price_notes: 10-week term. Eligible for kids & teens 8-class pack and monthly membership.

group_classes.name: Pre-Ballet & Creative Movement (Ages 4–6)
group_classes.description: A playful introduction to ballet and creative movement for young dancers ages 4–6.

group_classes.name: Teen Ballet II (Ages 10–14)
group_classes.description: A technique-focused teen ballet class for dancers with at least 2 years of prior training.

group_classes.name: Hip Hop Foundations (Adults) Downtown
group_classes.description: A high-energy hip hop class focusing on grooves, rhythm, and core foundations. Perfect for adult beginners and returning dancers.
group_classes.price_notes: 8-week series. Also available as drop-in at the adult drop-in rate when space allows.

group_classes.name: Adult Hip Hop Drop-In (All Levels)
group_classes.description: Ongoing hip hop drop-in class where you can join any week. Each class features a full warm-up, drills, and a short combo.
group_classes.price_notes: Standard adult drop-in pricing. Included with adult monthly unlimited membership and usable with class packs.

group_classes.name: Kids Hip Hop (Ages 7–9) Downtown
group_classes.description: A fun hip hop class for kids ages 7–9 focusing on rhythm, coordination, and musicality with age-appropriate choreography.
group_classes.price_notes: 8-week term. One trial class available with kids free trial offer.

group_classes.name: Hip Hop Free Trial (Adults)
group_classes.description: A free 60-minute trial hip hop class for new adult students. Learn basic grooves and a fun short combo.
group_classes.price_notes: Free for first-time adult students only. Advance booking required.

group_classes.name: Contemporary Flow (Adults) Downtown
group_classes.description: An expressive contemporary class blending floorwork, release technique, and musicality-focused combinations.
group_classes.price_notes: 8-week course; also included in adult monthly unlimited membership.

group_classes.name: Contemporary Technique (Adults) Midtown
group_classes.description: Technique-driven contemporary class for experienced dancers, including floorwork phrases and center combinations.
group_classes.price_notes: 8-week course, best paired with workshop pass for weekend intensives.

group_classes.name: Online Contemporary Flow (All Levels)
group_classes.description: A live-streamed contemporary class accessible from home, focusing on fluid phrases and gentle conditioning.
group_classes.price_notes: Single-session online rate. Included in adult online-only membership.

group_classes.name: Jazz Fusion (Adults) Downtown
group_classes.description: A dynamic jazz fusion class blending classic jazz, contemporary, and commercial styles.
group_classes.price_notes: 8-week series; drop-in available with adult drop-in pass.

group_classes.name: Beginner Tap (Adults) Uptown
group_classes.description: Beginner tap for adults, focusing on basic steps, timing, and developing clear sounds.
group_classes.price_notes: 8-week course. Tap shoes required; a limited number of rentals are available.

group_classes.name: Ballroom Social Essentials (Adults) Downtown
group_classes.description: Learn essential ballroom patterns and etiquette for social events, including waltz, foxtrot, and a touch of Latin.
group_classes.price_notes: 8-week course. Partner not required; we rotate partners during class.

group_classes.name: Family Dance Jam (All Ages)
group_classes.description: A playful family dance session where adults and kids move together through simple routines and games.
group_classes.price_notes: Price per family for a single drop-in session.

events.title: Summer Salsa Social Bootcamp
events.description: Kick off July with a focused Salsa bootcamp covering timing, partner connection, and core social patterns. Perfect for confident beginners and improvers wanting extra practice before weekend socials.

events.title: Contemporary Summer Intensive: Floorwork & Flow
events.description: A 3-hour intensive exploring contemporary floorwork, release, and improvisation. Recommended for intermediate and advanced dancers.

events.title: Kids Hip Hop Summer Jam (Ages 7–11)
events.description: A high-energy hip hop mini-camp with grooves, games, and a fun combo for friends and family at the end.

events.title: Tap Rhythms Lab: Time & Texture
events.description: Deep-dive into rhythmic patterns, musical phrasing, and improvisation drills for intermediate and advanced tap dancers.

events.title: Weekend Ballet Technique Workshop
events.description: A focused ballet technique workshop including extended barre, center, and turns across the floor. Suitable for advanced beginner and intermediate adults.

events.title: Ballroom Weekend Crash Course
events.description: Learn social ballroom basics in waltz, foxtrot, and rumba so you feel confident at weddings and formal events.

events.title: Jazz Funk Choreo Lab
events.description: A high-energy jazz funk workshop focusing on stylized choreography and performance quality. Suitable for dancers with at least 1 year of experience.

events.title: First Steps in Contemporary (Friday Series)
events.description: A beginner-friendly contemporary workshop introducing basic floorwork, release, and musicality. Great for dancers with ballet or jazz background.

events.title: Salsa Styling Lab: Spins & Shine Patterns
events.description: Work on solo shines and spin technique to add flair to your social dancing. Open level with options for different experience levels.

events.title: Summer Street Styles Workshop
events.description: Explore grooves, house, and hip hop foundations in a two-hour street styles workshop with Jamal and Kai.

events.title: Family Dance Picnic in the Park
events.description: Join us for an outdoor family dance party with simple follow-along routines, games, and a picnic hangout afterward.

events.title: Online Contemporary Lab: Expressive Phrasing
events.description: Train from home in this live-streamed contemporary lab focusing on phrasing, texture, and musical interpretation.

events.title: Back-to-Dance Ballet Refresher
events.description: Ease back into the studio after summer with a full barre and center refresher, including alignment tips and injury-prevention strategies.

events.title: Kids Creative Dance Camp – Day 1
events.description: First day of our weeklong kids creative dance camp, combining ballet basics, jazz, and creative movement games.
